examples: He also invests in education for his pressroom of 35 employees, offering classes in advanced specialties like UV printing, where the ink dries instantly on a box.
Cuomo told public radio's "Capitol Pressroom" that the state can't continue to give cities handouts.
Head on over to the GE pressroom to learn more about the technologies unveiled at CES 2011.
For more information, visit the pressroom (pressroom.yahoo.net) or the company's blog (yodel.yahoo.com).
